title: Create | Titan |
description:
An Addon for the Create mod.

Get your hands on the almost unpenetrable Gold-Titanium Alloy!
body:
# ⚠️ Important!

**This mod is still in beta, many things are Work-In-Progress, and many things are subject to change.**

The mod is survival friendly, JEI is recommended.

# 📦 Installation Requirements & Compatibility

This is an **addon** for [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) Forge and **requires it to be installed** alongside with **Forge** mod loader for **1.20.1**

✅ Create **5.0.x** & **6.0.x** (for Minecraft **1.20.1**) _should_ be compatible with this addon.

# 🛠️ About

This addon aims to add some insanely good, yet hard to get items. Such as:

- **Titanium** - Small titanium chunks are obtainable by crushing sand. They can be compacted into raw titanium and then smelted, to get Titanium ingots.
- **Titanium Gauntlet** - When worn, can be used as a Multi-Tool. Good for both fighting and mining.
- **Gold-Titanium Alloy** - Compacting gold and titanium with lava above a Super-Heated blaze burner turns it into Gold-Titanium Alloy, a really strong metal!
- **Gold-Titanium Alloy Armor** - By using mechanical crafters, this insane armor can be made. Not only is it extremly durable and resistant, but also has some special effects, like Resistance, Regeneration, Luck, Water breathing, Potion throwing ability and more!
- **Vroomanite** - Even stronger than Gold-Titanium Alloy, can be used to upgrade the armor, or craft the special machine - **Vrooxtractor** - which allows extracting items from... items
- **The Creator Station** - A randomly generating structure, spawning between Y -30 / Y 30

# 🗓️ Future plans

- Finishing/Removing currently unusable items
- Adding uses for the Gold-Titanium Alloy casing
- **No plans to backport this mod to any older versions**
